oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
min_role_or_permission: HCB admin (Doorkeeper admin_authenticator) on production; anyone in dev
notes: Web UI (Doorkeeper). Grants client_id + client_secret. Scopes to register: read write and/or granular ones (restricted, receipts:read, receipts:write, ledgers:read, organizations:read, card_grants:write, user_lookup, event_followers, admin:read, admin:write, pii). authorized_applications controller is skipped (no user-facing 'my authorized apps' page).

flow: Authorize an app on a user's behalf (authorization code flow)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
min_role_or_permission: Any signed-in HCB user (blocked if account is locked)
notes: User sees consent screen and approves; browser is redirected to redirect_uri with ?code=. HTTPS enforced on redirect URIs except localhost.

flow: Exchange authorization code for access + refresh tokens
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Returns access_token (prefix hcb_, expires in 2 hours), refresh_token, scope. Content-Type x-www-form-urlencoded or JSON.

flow: Sign in from a CLI or device (device authorization flow) — step 1: get device code
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Returns device_code, user_code, verification_uri, interval (doorkeeper-device_authorization_grant gem).

flow: Device flow — step 2: user verifies device in browser
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: User visits the page and enters/confirms the user_code to authorize the device.

flow: Device flow — step 3: poll for token
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Poll at the returned interval until the user approves; then receive access + refresh tokens.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Access tokens expire after 2 hours; expired tokens get 401 invalid_auth. use_refresh_token is enabled.

flow: Get an app-only token (client credentials grant)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Supported by grant_flows but the token has no user attached — nearly every v4 endpoint requires current_user so this is of limited practical use.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: RFC 7009 revocation endpoint.

flow: Revoke the current token / log out
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Sets revoked_at on the presented token. Returns success, owner_email, key_name (app name).

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Standard Doorkeeper endpoints for checking token validity/scopes/expiry.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Returns id (usr_…), name, avatar URL, admin/auditor flags, own email + birthday. shipping_address comes from last physical card; billing_address from Stripe cardholder.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Non-hidden orgs ordered by join date desc. Each org: name, slug, country, icon URL, background_image URL, transparent, playground_mode, financially_frozen, fee_percentage, donation_page_available.

flow: List all my cards across orgs
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Returns type (virtual/physical), status, name, last4/exp (only after activation), personalization + shipping for physical cards.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Grants where I'm the grantee, newest first.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: ledgers:read
notes: Charges on my own Stripe cards still missing a receipt, newest first, paginated envelope (total_count, has_more, data).

flow: Get my available mobile app icons
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Flags: frc (robotics team), admin, platinum card, testflight, hackathon_grant, premium.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Any authenticated user via a TRUSTED OAuth app
notes: 1-hour JWT with user_id + email for embedding the Intercom messenger (used by the official mobile app).

flow: Look up any user by public ID
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: user_lookup
min_role_or_permission: HCB auditor role + token with admin:read
notes: Returns the public user object. Email/birthday only with pii scope + admin:write.

flow: Look up any user by email
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: user_lookup
min_role_or_permission: HCB auditor role + token with admin:read
notes: Same visibility rules as lookup by ID.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Each invitation embeds sender (user object), organization (org object), role, accepted flag.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Cancelled/rejected invitations 404.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Joins the org (onboarding tour suppressed). Returns the invitation.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Declines the invitation.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org member (any role) or HCB auditor
key_params: org id (org_…) or slug in path
notes: Pending invitations only.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org manager (or HCB admin w/ admin:write)
notes: Sends the standard invite email. Invitee does not need an existing HCB account.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org manager or the invite's original sender
notes: Returns { message: "Invitation successfully deleted" }.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ or HCB auditor w/ admin:read
notes: Core fields: name, slug, country, parent_id, transparent, financially_frozen, playground_mode, fee_percentage, donation_page_available, icon, background_image.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
notes: Adds balance_cents (available balance) and fee_balance_cents.

flow: Get an org's account & routing numbers
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
min_role_or_permission: Org member+ (or auditor) AND plan has account numbers enabled
notes: Adds account_number, routing_number, swift_bic_code for receiving funds.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
notes: Adds total_spent_cents and total_raised_cents.

flow: List an org's team members and roles
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
notes: Each member: user object, joined_at, role. Emails visible only for users who share an org with you (or pii scope).

flow: Get an org's balance history by date
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
notes: Daily running balance for up to the past year (cached 5 min), including today's live balance. For charts.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: event_followers
notes: Array of user objects following the org.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: organizations:read
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ (and sub-orgs enabled or existing)
notes: Sub-orgs ordered by team join date.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org manager (or member if member_subevent_creation flag on); sub-orgs enabled on plan
key_params: name, email (first organizer, invited as signee), cosigner_email, country, scoped_tags
notes: Inherits parent's transparency, risk level and subevent plan. Point of contact = you if HCB admin w/ admin:write, else system user.

flow: Download an org's logo or background image
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Signed ActiveStorage blob URLs — fetch directly without Authorization header.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: ledgers:read
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ or HCB auditor w/ admin:read
notes: Merged pending + settled ledger, paginated envelope. type values: ach_transfer, mailed_check, hcb_transfer, card_charge, check_deposit, donation, invoice, refund, fiscal_sponsorship_fee, reimbursement, wire, paypal_transfer, wise_transfer.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: ledgers:read
key_params: filters[search]=text, filters[minimum_amount]/[maximum_amount] (dollars), filters[start_date]/[end_date], filters[user_id]=usr_…, filters[tag_id]=tag_…, filters[category], filters[merchant], filters[expenses]=true or filters[revenue]=true, filters[missing_receipts]=true, filters[order_by]
notes: Same endpoint as ledger list — filters combine.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: ledgers:read
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ in any of the transaction's orgs, the purchasing cardholder, or HCB auditor
key_params: :id = txn_…; expand=organization (auto-expanded on the unscoped route)
notes: Returns amount_cents, date, memo, pending/declined/reversed flags, tags, missing_receipt/lost_receipt, plus a type-specific sub-object: card_charge (merchant name/country/network_id, wallet, charge_method, spent_at, decline_reason, card), donation, invoice, check, ach_transfer, transfer (disbursement), check_deposit, expense_payout, or wise_transfer.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Sets a custom memo (has_custom_memo becomes true). Returns updated transaction.

flow: Get AI/heuristic memo suggestions for a transaction
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Returns up to 4 suggested memo strings.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org member+ (tag must belong to the same org)
notes: Replaces the transaction's tag set; pass [] to clear.

flow: Mark a transaction as no/lost receipt
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:write
notes: Removes it from missing-receipt lists. Returns confirmation message.

flow: List receipts attached to a transaction
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:read
min_role_or_permission: Anyone who can view the transaction
notes: Each receipt: url, preview_url, filename, uploader (user object). Deprecated nested alias: GET /api/v4/organizations/:org/transactions/:txn/receipts.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:read
notes: Receipts you uploaded that aren't attached to any transaction yet.

flow: Upload a receipt to a transaction
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:write
min_role_or_permission: Org member+ of the transaction's org (or the purchaser / HCB admin)
notes: 201 with receipt object. Recorded as upload_method=api; OCR extraction + pairing run async.

flow: Upload a receipt to my Receipt Bin
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:write
notes: Receipt lands unattached in your bin; HCB suggests transaction pairings asynchronously.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Signed blob URL — download directly with no Authorization header. Use the filename field for naming.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
notes: Rendered image preview; null for CSVs or when preview generation failed.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:write
min_role_or_permission: Bin receipts: the uploader. Transaction receipts: org member+ (unlocked). Reimbursement-expense receipts: report owner or org manager. HCB admin: always
key_params: :id = rct_… (hashid also accepted for old mobile clients)
notes: Returns { message: "Receipt successfully deleted" }.

flow: Move a receipt from the bin onto a transaction (composite)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: receipts:read + receipts:write
notes: No single move endpoint exists: download from url, re-upload with transaction_id, then delete the original only after a 201.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Anyone who can view the transaction
notes: Oldest first. admin_only comments are hidden unless you're an HCB auditor w/ admin:read. Each comment: content, user, optional file URL. Deprecated nested alias under /organizations/:org/transactions/:txn/comments.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: User in any of the transaction's orgs (incl. parent-org users)
notes: 201 with the comment object.

flow: Attach a file to a comment / download comment attachments
endpoint: /api/v4/comments (file param); file URL in comment object
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Response includes a signed blob URL for the attachment — downloadable without auth headers.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Visible only to HCB staff.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Each tag: label, color, emoji.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: none

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: 201 with the tag. Apply it to transactions via PATCH transaction tag_ids.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Removes the tag from all transactions.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ AND org approved with cards enabled
notes: Newest first.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+, the grantee (for grant cards), or HCB auditor
notes: last4/exp only shown once activated. Physical cards include personalization (color, logo_url) and shipping (status, eta, address).

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: shipping.status (from Stripe) + shipping.eta + shipping address inside the card object.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Anyone (common designs); org member+ w/ event_id for org-specific designs
notes: Returns id, name, color, status, logo_url (downloadable). HCB auditors w/ admin:read also see unlisted designs.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org member+ (not playground mode); user needs birthday set + verified phone number
notes: 201 with the card.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org member+; birthday + verified phone required
notes: Ships to US addresses only. Card must be activated on arrival.

flow: Activate a physical card on arrival
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Verifies last4 belongs to your card, cancels the card it replaces (if any), marks activated and unfreezes.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org manager, the cardholder (member+), or the grantee
notes: Records who froze it (last_frozen_by).

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Same as freeze — but if someone else froze it only a manager can unfreeze; blocked while org is financially frozen
notes: Errors if already active.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Irreversible; errors if already canceled.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Delegates to freeze/defrost/activate. Use the dedicated endpoints instead.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+, the cardholder, or HCB auditor
notes: Paginated envelope of the card's charges.

flow: Reveal a virtual card's full number (PAN/CVC via Stripe)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: The cardholder only + TRUSTED OAuth app + virtual card (grant cards must be pre-authorized)
notes: Returns ephemeralKeyId/Secret + stripe_id; feed to Stripe's SDK to display full card details. Usage is analytics-tracked.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ AND transfers enabled on plan
notes: Newest first.

flow: Send a card grant to someone by email
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: card_grants:write
min_role_or_permission: Org manager (grants enabled on plan) — or HCB admin w/ admin:write
key_params: amount_cents, email, purpose, instructions, invite_message, merchant_lock, category_lock, keyword_lock, one_time_use, pre_authorization_required, expiration_at; admins may add sent_by_email to send as another user
notes: Emails the grantee; funds move via an internal disbursement. Response auto-expands user, organization, disbursements. Validation errors return 422 invalid_operation.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+, the grantee, or HCB auditor
notes: Includes amount_cents, status, locks, allowed_merchants/categories, purpose, one_time_use, pre_authorization_required, expires_on, card_id.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
key_params: merchant_lock, category_lock, keyword_lock, purpose, one_time_use, instructions, expiration_at
notes: Returns updated grant.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Moves additional funds onto the grant.

flow: Withdraw funds from a card grant
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Pulls unspent funds back to the org.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org manager or the grantee (grant active)
notes: Returns remaining balance to the org and kills the card.

flow: Activate a received grant (issue its virtual card)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: The grantee (once authorized; HCB admin can force)
notes: Creates the Stripe virtual card for the grant; card_id then appears on the grant. Grantee then uses card endpoints (freeze/ephemeral_keys etc.).

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+, the grantee, or HCB auditor
notes: Paginated envelope of spending on the grant's card.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
key_params: event_id (or organization_id), ach_transfer[routing_number, account_number, recipient_name, recipient_email, bank_name, amount_money, payment_for, send_email_notification, invoiced_at, file]; HCB admins w/ admin:write may add scheduled_on
notes: Hard cap: amounts over $500.00 (sudo-mode threshold) are rejected via API. Optional file is attached as the receipt. Transfer enters HCB's approval queue.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
key_params: event_id, check[memo, amount_cents, payment_for, recipient_name, recipient_email, address_line1/line2/city/state/zip, send_email_notification, file]
notes: Same $500.00 API cap. Optional file attached as receipt. Sent via Increase, enters approval queue.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Newest first.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Route exists but IncreaseCheckPolicy defines no show? so it inherits false and always returns 403. Fetch check details via the transaction object's check sub-object instead.

flow: Deposit a paper check by photo
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org member+ (plan allows check deposits; not playground mode)
notes: 201 with status; processed asynchronously with estimated_arrival_date.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Includes status, rejection reason/description if rejected, estimated_arrival_date, submitter.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Same fields as list.

endpoint: front_url / back_url in check deposit object
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: n/a
min_role_or_permission: URL only rendered for org managers, HCB auditors, or the uploader
notes: Signed blob URLs — downloadable directly once obtained.

flow: Transfer money to another HCB org (disbursement)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Manager of the SOURCE org AND manager of the destination org (destination-manager requirement waived if source plan allows unrestricted disbursements; HCB admin bypasses)
notes: May be fronted instantly if the source plan supports it. Response is the disbursement; Location header points at the transaction.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ via a TRUSTED OAuth app
key_params: amount_cents, name, email, message, anonymous, tax_deductible, fee_covered
notes: Creates an in_person donation (optionally grossed up to cover fees if org has fee-covering enabled). Used by the mobile app's donation collection.

flow: Take the donation card payment via Stripe Terminal (composite)
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ via TRUSTED OAuth app
notes: payment_intent returns payment_intent_id + client_secret; connection token initializes the Stripe Terminal SDK for tap-to-pay, completing the donation.

flow: Get a Stripe Terminal connection token
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Returns terminal_connection_token for the Stripe Terminal SDK.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Sponsor contact + address records used for invoicing. Never visible via transparency mode.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: none

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: 201 with the sponsor. Prerequisite for creating an invoice.

flow: Send an invoice to a sponsor
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org member+ AND org approved with invoices enabled
notes: Creates and sends a Stripe-backed invoice to the sponsor's contact email.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
min_role_or_permission: Org reader+ (org approved & invoices enabled; public orgs readable)
notes: Each invoice: status, to (sponsor name), amount_due, memo, due_date, item details.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: none declared (restricted tokens blocked; legacy tokens OK)
notes: Full details gated by policy; public viewers see status/to/amount only.

flow: Use admin read powers across HCB
oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: admin:read (+ user_lookup etc. where declared)
min_role_or_permission: HCB auditor/admin/superadmin role AND token carrying admin:read
notes: Unlocks: any org/transaction/card visibility, users#show/by_email, _debug.hcb_code on transactions, unlisted card designs, admin_only comments. Without the scope the API pretends you're a normal user.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: admin:write
min_role_or_permission: HCB admin/superadmin role AND token carrying admin:write
notes: Unlocks: scheduling ACH transfers (scheduled_on), sending card grants as another user (sent_by_email), becoming point-of-contact on sub-org creation. Independent of admin:read.

oauth_scope_restricted_tokens: pii (+ admin:write)
min_role_or_permission: HCB admin + token with pii and admin:write scopes
notes: expand_pii gate: email and birthday of users other than yourself (and their shipping/billing addresses via expand) are only rendered with this combination — or for users sharing an org with you (email only).
